jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BEL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
